description_long: This sculpture depicts a dynamic human figure, possibly male, in a dramatic pose with one knee bent and one arm reaching across the chest. Draped in flowing robes, the figure appears to be carrying a large cylindrical object slung over the shoulder, which may represent a staff or bundle. The facial features and hair are finely detailed, and the posture suggests movement or a moment of action. The base of the sculpture is irregular, with the figure standing atop a textured platform that resembles clouds or rough terrain. The surface is matte and appears to be made of stone or a similar material, with visible weathering and patina. The overall form is robust and solid, suitable for outdoor display in a public space.
description: A detailed stone sculpture of a robed human figure in motion, carrying a cylindrical object over the shoulder and standing on a textured base.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the draped robes and the cylindrical object slung over the figure's shoulder, with the back of the head and body visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the forward-leaning posture, bent knee, and the cylindrical object extending behind the figure.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the expressive face, outstretched arm, and the dynamic stance of the figure atop the textured base.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the curvature of the robes, the figure's bowed head, and the cylindrical object resting on the shoulder.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure carrying a cylindrical object
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the background is isolated and neutral.
